datasets.name: ds_crs__repunc
queryLines:
SELECT
  accountnumbertype,
  anio_fiscal,
  birthdate_controllingperson,
  birthdate_individual,
  crs_version,
  in_organisation,
  marca_rfc,
  messagerefid,
  name,
  name_individual,
  name_organisation,
  receivingcountry,
  reportingperiod,
  rfc_localizado,
  tin_individual,

  transmittingcountry,
  idejecucion,

  filtermenu_crs,
  MEASURE(registros_crs_reporteunc) as registros_crs_reporteunc,
  MEASURE(crs_registros_global_repunc) as crs_registros_global_repunc
FROM sat_reportes.default.mv_crs__repunc
GROUP BY ALL

datasets.name: ds_crs_sabana
queryLines:
SELECT
  accountnumber_accountreport,
  acctholdertype_accountholder,
  anio_fiscal,
  birthdate_controllingperson,
  birthdate_individual,
  contact,
  messagerefid,
  messagetype,
  paymenttype_payment,
  receivingcountry,
  reportingperiod,
  timestamp,
  transmittingcountry,
  warning,
  fechainsercion,
  idejecucion,
  nametype_individual,
  nametype_organisation,
  p_fechainsercion,
  version,
  crs_repunc_transmittingcountry,
  MEASURE(registros_crs_sabana) as registros_crs_sabana,
  MEASURE(crs_registros_global_sabana) as crs_registros_global_sabana
FROM sat_reportes.default.mv_crs_sabana
GROUP BY ALL

datasets.name: ds_fat_repunc
queryLines:
SELECT
  accountclosed,
  accountnumber,
  accountnumbertype,
  addressfix_individual,
  addressfix_intermediary,
  addressfix_organisation,
  addressfix_reportingfi,
  addressfix_sponsor,
  addressfix_substantialowner_individual,
  addressfix_substantialowner_organisation,
  addressfreefix_individual,
  addressfreefix_intermediary,
  addressfreefix_organisation,
  addressfreefix_reportingfi,
  addressfreefix_sponsor,
  addressfreefix_substantialowner_individual,
  addressfreefix_substantialowner_organisation,
  addressfree_individual,
  addressfree_intermediary,
  addressfree_organisation,
  addressfree_reportingfi,
  addressfree_sponsor,
  addressfree_substantialowner_individual,
  addressfree_substantialowner_organisation,
  birthdate_individual,
  birthdate_substantialowner_individual,
  city_birthdate_individual,
  corrdocrefid_accountreport,
  corrdocrefid_intermediary,
  corrdocrefid_nilreport,
  corrdocrefid_reportingfi,
  corrdocrefid_sponsor,
  corrmessagerefid,
  corrmessagerefid_accountreport,
  corrmessagerefid_intermediary,
  corrmessagerefid_nilreport,
  corrmessagerefid_reportingfi,
  corrmessagerefid_sponsor,
  countrycode_countryinfo_individual,
  currcode_accountbalance,
  currcode_fatca501,
  currcode_fatca502,
  currcode_fatca503,
  currcode_fatca504,
  marca_rfc,
  messagerefid,
  name,
  name_individual,
  name_organisation,
  receivingcountry,
  reportingperiod,
  rfc_localizado,
  tin_individual,
  tin_organisation,
  timestamp,
  transmittingcountry,
  idejecucion,
  crs_repunc_messagerefid,
  crs_repunc_timestamp,
  filtermenu_fatca,
  MEASURE(registros_rep_unico) as registros_rep_unico,
  MEASURE(fat_registros_global_repunc) as fat_registros_global_repunc
FROM sat_reportes.default.mv_fat_repunc
GROUP BY ALL

datasets.name: ds_fat_sabana
queryLines:
SELECT
  accountclosed,
  accountnumber,
  accountnumbertype,
  acctholdertype,
  birthdate_individual,
  birthdate_substantialowner_individual,
  contact,
  corrmessagerefid,
  messagerefid,
  messagetype,
  payment,
  paymenttype,
  receivingcountry,
  reportingperiod,
  timestamp,
  transmittingcountry,
  warning,
  fechainsercion,
  idejecucion,
  nametype_individual,
  nametype_organisation,
  p_fechainsercion,
  version,
  MEASURE(registros_sabana) as registros_sabana,
  MEASURE(fat_registros_global_sabana) as fat_registros_global_sabana
FROM sat_reportes.default.mv_fat_sabana
GROUP BY ALL
